## MetaBlooms governed PR checklist

- [ ] Boot/replay verifier passes locally or in CI.
- [ ] Any changed code has been read before and after edits.
- [ ] New/changed behavior has a validator, fixture, or receipt.
- [ ] Artifact hashes and sidecars are synchronized.
- [ ] No direct claims of execution without artifact evidence.
- [ ] Security impact checked: secrets, workflow permissions, dependency changes, and write paths.
- [ ] Release/export impact checked.
